title: Managed Repo Audit System — Final Verification, Gap Analysis, and Lockdown (Rev 2)

test_suite.skipped_reason: Live SwitchBoard integration tests — require running service

phase_completion.name: Artifact Contract Definition
phase_completion.notes: ManagedArtifactManifest, ManagedRunStatus, full vocabulary enums; included in Phase 1+3 counts

phase_completion.name: VideoFoundry Producer Contract
phase_completion.notes: OpsCenter ready; VideoFoundry producer-side artifact_manifest.json writing not yet implemented; 6 fake-producer integration tests verify the chain

phase_completion.name: Behavior Calibration
phase_completion.notes: Analyzer, rules, anti-collapse guardrails, CalibrationDecision gate; 35 anti-collapse tests included

phase_completion.name: Artifacts / Findings / Recommendations Separation
phase_completion.notes: GuardrailViolation on forbidden fields; AST boundary tests; frozen models; included in Phase 8 count

phase_completion.name: Fixture Harvesting
phase_completion.notes: harvest_fixtures(); load_fixture_pack(); 7 harvest profiles; CopyPolicy; fixture_pack.schema.json

phase_completion.notes: run_mini_regression_suite(); suite loader; suite report persistence; limitations aggregation; unique run_id

phase_completion.notes: run_governed_audit(); 8 policy checks; fcntl file locking; manual approval; --state-dir CLI

invariants.name: No Managed Repo Imports
invariants.evidence: grep 'from videofoundry|import videofoundry' src/operations_center/ → 0 matches; AST tests in 7 modules

invariants.name: Contract Ownership
invariants.evidence: All schemas, models, and contracts defined in src/operations_center/; no VideoFoundry-side schema files; fixture_pack.schema.json generated from OpsCenter model

invariants.name: Discovery Chain
invariants.evidence: audit_dispatch/lifecycle.py: discover_run_status_bucket() → discover_post_execution() → artifact_manifest_path; 15 lifecycle tests; 6 integration producer tests

invariants.name: Manifest as Source of Truth
invariants.evidence: load_artifact_manifest() in artifact_index/loader.py is the only entry point to artifact data; no directory scanning exists

invariants.name: Run Identity Authority
invariants.evidence: prepare_managed_audit_invocation() in run_identity/generator.py; AUDIT_RUN_ID injected before subprocess; 52 run identity tests

invariants.name: One Audit Per Repo
invariants.evidence: Thread-safe ManagedRepoAuditLockRegistry in audit_dispatch/locks.py; acquire_audit_lock(repo_id) raises RepoLockAlreadyHeldError if held; process-scoped noted in dispatch_managed_audit() docstring

invariants.name: No Auto-Collapse
invariants.evidence: behavior_calibration/guardrails.py: _FORBIDDEN_MUTATION_FIELDS; assert_no_mutation_fields() raises GuardrailViolation; 35 anti-collapse tests; no auto_apply/execute/deploy in recommendation models

invariants.name: Recommendations Are Advisory
invariants.evidence: No auto_apply/execute methods in behavior_calibration/; CalibrationDecision.approved_by required; related_recommendation_ids is list[str] context only; does not affect governance decision

invariants.name: Fixture Packs Preserve Provenance
invariants.evidence: FixturePack: source_repo_id, source_run_id, source_audit_type, source_manifest_path, source_index_summary; FixtureArtifact: source_artifact_id, checksum, copied; fixture_pack.schema.json generated

invariants.name: Replay Is Local and Deterministic
invariants.evidence: slice_replay/runner.py: no subprocess calls; no dispatch import; reads fixture pack only; 46 replay tests; test_chain_no_dispatch_imported integration test

invariants.name: Mini Regression Does Not Escalate
invariants.evidence: mini_regression/runner.py: no dispatch_managed_audit import; grep returns 0 results; 40 suite tests; integration chain test verifies no dispatch import

invariants.name: Full Audit Governance Gates Heavy Runs
invariants.evidence: audit_governance/runner.py: can_dispatch gate; dispatch called only when decision==approved OR approval_validated; 91 governance tests; 18 CLI tests

invariants.name: Mini Regression First
invariants.evidence: audit_governance/policy.py: mini_regression_first_policy; urgency=low/normal without suite report → needs_manual_approval; TestMiniRegressionFirstRule covers all branches

rev1_gaps_closed.description: Cross-process file locking for budget/cooldown state

tests/integration/test_producer_contract_flow.py — 6 tests covering run_status validation, manifest load, discovery chain, index build, failed run, import boundary
tests/integration/test_fixture_to_regression_chain.py — full harvest→replay→regression chain test + dispatch import boundary assertion

rev1_gaps_closed.description: Governance CLI had no typer.testing.CliRunner tests
rev1_gaps_closed.closure: tests/unit/cli/test_governance_cli.py — 18 tests covering request/evaluate/approve/run/inspect; --state-dir added to cmd_run for test isolation
mini_regression/runner.py aggregates replay_report.limitations into suite_limitations (de-duplicated); 4 TestSuiteLimitations tests added
_check_known_repo() now returns status=failed for empty known_repos; TestEmptyKnownReposDeniesAll (4 tests) asserts denial
TestNegativePaths (6 tests), TestFileLocking (4 tests), TestDispatchedRunId (2 tests) added to test_governance.py
uuid4().hex[:8] suffix added; test_make_suite_run_id_unique asserts 20 calls produce 20 unique IDs

rev1_gaps_closed.description: No JSON schema for fixture packs
rev1_gaps_closed.closure: schemas/fixture_harvesting/fixture_pack.schema.json generated from FixturePack.model_json_schema() and written with $schema annotation

rev1_gaps_closed.description: Documentation polish: process-scoped lock note; empty known_repos behavior undocumented
rev1_gaps_closed.closure: dispatch_managed_audit() docstring notes process-scoped lock limitation; empty known_repos behavior explicit in code, tests, and architecture doc

rev1_gaps_closed.description: AuditGovernanceReport.dispatched_run_id not accessible at top level
rev1_gaps_closed.closure: @property dispatched_run_id added to AuditGovernanceReport; TestDispatchedRunId (2 tests) verify None-when-not-dispatched and value-when-dispatched

gaps.description: Phase 5 VideoFoundry producer-side implementation not complete. artifact_manifest.json is not written by any real VideoFoundry audit run. run_status.json does not populate artifact_manifest_path for any audit type in production. The entire Phase 7-12 runtime chain has never executed against real artifacts.
gaps.evidence: config/managed_repos/videofoundry.yaml — all audit types have status: planned for artifact_manifest; no artifact_manifest.json found in real VideoFoundry run directories; fake-producer integration tests validate the chain works end-to-end
gaps.recommended_action: Phase 5 VideoFoundry implementation task. All OpsCenter code is ready to consume once Phase 5 is delivered. No OpsCenter changes required.

gaps.description: known_audit_types={} (empty dict) causes _check_known_audit_type() to return status=warning, not status=failed. This means an empty known_audit_types configuration silently permits all audit types. This is asymmetric with known_repos=[] which was fixed in Rev 1 to return status=failed.
gaps.evidence: audit_governance/policy.py:71-77 — if allowed is None: return PolicyResult(status='warning'). Runtime confirmed: evaluate_governance_policies with known_repos=['videofoundry'] and known_audit_types={} → decision='approved'
gaps.recommended_action: Change _check_known_audit_type() to return status='failed' when known_audit_types is empty (matching _check_known_repo() pattern). Add test asserting denial.

gaps.description: AuditGovernanceReport (the persisted JSON file) does not include a governance_status field. Only AuditGovernedRunResult (the in-memory result) carries governance_status. Downstream tools reading the persisted JSON must infer status from decision.decision + dispatch_result_summary is not None, which is non-obvious and error-prone.
gaps.evidence: audit_governance/models.py — AuditGovernanceReport.model_fields does not include governance_status. AuditGovernedRunResult.governance_status is never persisted to the report JSON.
gaps.recommended_action: Add governance_status: GovernanceStatus field to AuditGovernanceReport and populate it in the runner when writing the report.

gaps.description: audit_governance/file_locks.py uses fcntl which is available on Linux and macOS but not Windows. The deployment target is Linux and Windows is not supported, but this platform dependency is not documented in the module or deployment notes.
gaps.evidence: file_locks.py:5 — import fcntl. No sys.platform guard or cross-platform fallback. No deployment documentation mentions this dependency.
gaps.recommended_action: Add module-level comment noting Linux/macOS requirement. If Windows support is ever needed, replace with portalocker or msvcrt.locking.

gaps.description: The operations-center-regression CLI (Phase 11) has no typer.testing.CliRunner tests. Only the governance CLI has CLI-layer tests. The regression CLI commands (run, inspect, list) are only exercised at the runner/module level, not at the CLI invocation layer.
gaps.evidence: tests/unit/cli/ contains only test_governance_cli.py. src/operations_center/entrypoints/regression/main.py has no corresponding CLI test file.
gaps.recommended_action: Add tests/unit/cli/test_regression_cli.py covering at minimum: run (with suite file), inspect (with report file), and failure paths (missing file, invalid JSON).

gaps.description: In mini_regression/runner.py, a partial status from SliceReplayReport is silently treated as passed for the suite entry. This assumption is documented only as an inline comment and is not covered by a dedicated test or the Phase 11 architecture document.
gaps.evidence: runner.py:160 — 'passed'  # partial → treat as passed for suite purposes. No test in test_suite.py explicitly asserts the partial→passed mapping.
gaps.recommended_action: Add one test asserting that a suite entry with a partial replay result produces status='passed'. Add a note to docs/architecture/managed_repo_mini_regression_suite.md explaining the rationale.

lockdown_rules: No new code may bypass Phase 1-12 contracts.
No new discovery paths may bypass run_status.json.
No new artifact consumers may bypass manifest/index.
No calibration output may mutate runtime.
No replay/regression layer may call dispatch.
No new governance approvals may bind on decision_id alone — must use request_id.
No file-backed state may be read/written without holding the fcntl exclusive lock.
known_non_goals: No full audit scheduling (daemon, watch loop, cron)
No managed repo Python code imports
No Windows support for file locking (Linux/macOS only)

final_declaration.remaining_improvements: 6 gaps documented; 0 critical; 1 high (Phase 5 producer delivery); 1 medium (known_audit_types empty behavior); 4 low; primary unblocking dependency remains Phase 5 VideoFoundry producer delivery
final_declaration.declaration: The managed repo audit system across Phases 0-12 is declared locked as of 2026-04-26 (Rev 2). All 13 invariants hold. 2662 tests pass (2648 unit + 14 integration). No contract violations. No forbidden imports. Correct unidirectional import graph enforced by AST tests. All 11 Rev 1 gaps closed. 6 Rev 2 gaps documented with no critical severity. The system is ready for Phase 5 producer delivery.
